falsification_conditions.condition: The S&P 500 closes above 5,200 (resistance level from bottom_2024_aug pattern)
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: A breakout above this key level would indicate a structural shift invalidating the 'hold' signal and suggesting a new bullish trend.

falsification_conditions.condition: The 14-day moving average of the CBOE VIX exceeds 30
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: Sustained elevated volatility would contradict the 'hold' signal's assumption of stable market conditions, indicating potential blowoff momentum.

falsification_conditions.condition: The Federal Reserve announces a 50-basis-point rate cut in its next policy statement
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: This aggressive intervention would directly counter the 'hold' signal's implication of neutral macro conditions, proving the current verdict incorrect.

doctrine: If you can't list what would prove your call wrong, you don't have a real call.
